title: prangos scabrifolia
intro: Prangos scabrifolia, also known as the prickly peony, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Prangos scabrifolia include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever and fatigue. Prangos scabrifolia can be prepared as an herbal medicine, often used in traditional Chinese medicine, in the form of dried roots, decoctions, or infusions.
